mapper.select: select c.*, u.nickname as userNickname from comment c join user u on c.user_id = u.id where c.post_id = #{postId} order by c.createtime asc
mapper.insert: insert into comment (post_id, user_id, content, createtime, updatetime) values (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update comment set content = #{content}, updatetime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select c.*, p.title as postTitle from comment c join post p on c.post_id = p.id where c.user_id = #{userId} order by c.createtime desc
